surface_contract.placement: after optional BlockPrologue and before the first runtime semantic item

hash_role.trivia_policy: the existing hash-role policy admits horizontal whitespace and comments on the same physical line; a physical line break is rejected

allowed_inputs: fully committed immutable module or type constant with stable identity
normalized generic type or static argument
activation-local temporary whose cleanup is fully discharged
forbidden_inputs: caller task, actor, thread, or isolation identity
time, random, environment, locale, or ambient provider

activation_contract_digest_inputs: sorted helper CallableImplementationId and safety-summary digest records
identity_contract.helper_requirement: every helper is statically selected, activation-free, pure, synchronous, nonthrowing, authority-free, resource-safe, and bound to its exact safety-summary digest
excluded_identity_inputs: source, import, use, or link order
inlining, LTO, or JIT compilation identity
identity_contract.hash_collision_policy: equal hash with unequal canonical owner recipe is a terminal link error

triggers: actual invocation of the final selected CallableImplementationId
non_triggers: function value creation, copy, or move
inlining, AOT compilation, or JIT compilation
ordered_events: validate inputs and acquire staging temporaries

ensure_failure.staged_temporary_cleanup: exactly once in reverse acquisition order

publication_contract.language_edge: Ready or Failed publication happens-before every caller that leaves the ensure barrier

failure_contract.failure_identity: one FunctionStaticFailureId per RuntimeInstanceId and FunctionStaticOwnerId terminal failure
failure_contract.cause: the initiating Defect identity and cause chain

public_semantic_fields: sorted helper identity and safety-summary records
module_api_residue.activation_add_remove_or_contract_change: public API digest delta requiring compatible consumer rebuild or terminal stale-metadata rejection

separate_or_rejected_families.top_level_static_def: NOT_CURRENT; retain STATIC_FUNCTION_DECLARATION_NOT_CURRENT and no automatic rewrite

rules.title: Stable design and product evidence remain separate
rules.contract: The bounded language semantics are STABLE_DESIGN and source_activation none; every product lane remains NOT_RUN until a target-bound receipt exists.

rules.title: The surface is one current hash-role composition
rules.contract: Canonical source prints scope#static; parsing follows the existing same-line hash-role trivia law and rejects a physical line break without inventing a stricter lexical owner.

rules.title: Placement and cardinality are structural
rules.contract: CallableBlock admits at most one activation after optional compile-time BlockPrologue and before every runtime semantic item.

rules.title: Named synchronous owner admission is closed
rules.contract: Only the exact admitted_synchronous_named_owner_matrix owns the activation field; no family resemblance grants it to another declaration.

rules.title: Excluded callables remain excluded
rules.contract: Entry/local/constructor/cleanup/actor/closure/async/generator/FFI/recovery/bodyless-Trait/guard owners create no admitted activation HIR.

rules.title: Activation is not ordinary body control flow
rules.contract: The CST and AST retain a dedicated callable-body field and lowering never executes the block once per ordinary body traversal.

rules.title: First-caller data are unobservable
rules.contract: Receiver, parameters, defaults, Context, execution identity, ambient authority, nondeterminism, mutable globals, and lazy force are unavailable to the activation body.

rules.title: The body profile is closed and residue-free
rules.contract: The activation body is safe, synchronous, nonsuspending, noncancelling, throws Never, effects {}, authority-free, Unit-valued, and leaves zero persistent mutable, Resource, or needsDrop residue.

rules.title: Static helper closure is exact
rules.contract: Only statically selected activation-free safe helpers are callable and each helper identity and safety-summary digest is bound in a sorted dependency record.

rules.title: CallableImplementationId is the sole callable identity name
rules.contract: Every owner recipe, HIR record, API residue, fixture, and diagnostic trace uses CallableImplementationId rather than competing semantic-callable aliases.

rules.title: Owner identity is semantic and reproducible
rules.contract: FunctionStaticOwnerId separates overload, implementation, generic instantiation, and effective static evidence while excluding source order, unused context, machine address, and backend code identity.

rules.title: Only final actual invocation triggers
rules.contract: Lookup, candidate collection, function-value operations, reflection, and compilation are non-triggers; one actual invocation ensures only its final selected implementation owner.

rules.title: Activation precedes the existing ownership commit
rules.contract: Callee/receiver and arguments/defaults stage once before ensure; ensure succeeds before the existing atomic ownership_commit and body, and no invented CALL_INPUT_COMMIT event exists.

rules.title: The once state machine is terminal
rules.contract: One winner moves Dormant to Initializing and exactly one Ready or Failed terminal state; reset and retry counts remain zero.

rules.title: Publication has one language happens-before edge
rules.contract: Ready and Failed publication happens-before each released caller, forbids partial observation, and grants no user weak-atomic surface or fairness promise.

rules.title: Failure identity is uniform
rules.contract: Winner, waiters, and later callers observe the same owner-bound FUNCTION_STATIC_ACTIVATION_FAILED identity; the initiating Defect is a cause rather than a scheduler-dependent alternative primary.

rules.title: Reentry and activation dependencies cannot deadlock
rules.contract: Activation-bearing callees are statically forbidden and same-owner runtime reentry terminally fails with the canonical reentry cause, never deadlock, undefined behavior, retry, or reset.

rules.title: Separate compilation binds semantic residue
rules.contract: Module API digest records semantic owner, contract, safety, dependency, failure, and publication residue; backend-local symbols, entries, addresses, and table indices remain outside public canonical bytes.

rules.title: Removed and Preview families do not inherit activation
rules.contract: Top-level static def remains rejected without automatic rewrite, and value/effectful/module/class static plus Trait VIA/AUTO/specialization/local-witness successors remain nonactivated.

rules.title: Existing P-level and product boundaries are invariant
rules.contract: Semantic P0 stays zero, the exact existing feature P1 set stays 22 OPEN, this contract creates or closes no P1, M13 actions stay separate, and 15 product lanes stay NOT_RUN.
